message:
fix(demo): publicDir to default so gguf-parser.wasm ships in Pages build

vite.config.ts had `publicDir: resolve(__dirname, "../dist")` pointing
at the ROOT npm-package dist/. That pairing existed for the old
local-alias flow where demo imported turboquant-wasm from ../src/js/
and needed root dist/turboquant.wasm on the static path. That alias
was just removed — demo now consumes turboquant-wasm@^0.4.0 from
node_modules, so publicDir has no reason to look outside demo/.

With publicDir default (demo/public/), vite correctly copies:
  demo/public/gguf-parser.wasm     → dist/gguf-parser.wasm
  demo/public/system-cache.bin     → dist/system-cache.bin

GitHub Pages serves them at /turboquant-wasm/gguf-parser.wasm and
/turboquant-wasm/system-cache.bin, which is what the demo's fetch()
calls expect (model-loader.ts uses import.meta.env.BASE_URL + path;
main.ts uses "./system-cache.bin").

Verified: cd demo && rm -rf dist && bun run build → both files present
in demo/dist/.
